name: The Hallowed Monarch
explicitMods: Link Skills can target Damageable Minions
Your Linked Minions take 72% less Damage
On Killing a Rare monster, a random Linked Minion gains its Modifiers for 60 seconds
flavourText: "I don't judge who you are, Saresh. I judge what you do. True leadership
comes from fighting alongside those you command, from elevating them,
and sharing the glory of victory. This, you will never understand."
- Sekhema Orbala, to be crowned Garukhan

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports non-blessing spells.

flavourText: Let the eternal scream within
flow from your weeping blood.

hybrid.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that are instant and have no reservation. Cannot support Vaal skills or skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Draws out your own blood to power a buff for a duration, letting this skill inflict the Corrupting Blood debuff on enemies you hit, dealing physical damage over time for a short secondary duration. The buff's duration will be refreshed if you spend enough life before it expires.
explicitMods: Deals 25.6 Base Physical Damage per second
Buff Duration is refreshed after you spend a total of 47 Life
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Targets an allied player to apply a buff which links you to them for a duration. While linked, they deal additional fire damage based on your life. If the target dies while linked, you will also die. This skill cannot be triggered, or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
explicitMods: Linked target gains 187 to 281 Added Fire Damage
Linked target gains Added Fire Damage equal to 5% of your Maximum Life

Link breaks if target leaves range or line of sight for 4 seconds
Maximum 1 Link from any source per target
You die if Linked target dies
